message:
fix(security): use ct_eq for key comparison in ct_eq_checksum_maps (bd-3p9d)

ct_eq_checksum_maps() compared map keys with non-constant-time `!=`
while values correctly used ct_eq(). Both keys and values must use
constant-time comparison to prevent timing side-channel leaks.
Regression test added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
